append-empty-a4-page-to-pdf.title: Append an Empty A4 Page to a PDF
append-empty-a4-page-to-pdf.description: Loads an existing PDF, adds a new blank A4‑sized page at the end of the document, and saves the updated file.

insert-blank-page-at-specific-position.title: Insert Blank Page at Specific Position in PDF
insert-blank-page-at-specific-position.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, insert a blank page at a given index (page 3), and save the modified document.

copy-page-size-insert-new-page.title: Copy Page Size and Insert New Page at Position 5
copy-page-size-insert-new-page.description: Shows how to read the dimensions of page 2 in a PDF and insert a new empty page at position 5 with the same size using Aspose.Pdf.

add-multiple-empty-pages.title: Add Multiple Empty Pages Sequentially
add-multiple-empty-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add a series of empty pages to a PDF by iterating over a list of page counts, respecting an evaluation limit.

read-pdf-page-dimensions.title: Read and Log PDF Page Dimensions
read-pdf-page-dimensions.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, iterates through each page, obtains its width and height, and writes the dimensions to the console.

resize-pdf-page-to-letter-size.title: Resize PDF Page to Letter Size
resize-pdf-page-to-letter-size.description: Shows how to change the size of page 7 in a PDF document to the Letter format using Aspose.Pdf's SetPageSize method.

resize-all-pdf-pages-to-a5.title: Resize All PDF Pages to A5 Size
resize-all-pdf-pages-to-a5.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF's pages and resize each one to A5 dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-fourth-page-90-degrees.title: Rotate Fourth Page of PDF by 90 Degrees
rotate-fourth-page-90-degrees.description: Shows how to load a PDF, access the fourth page, rotate it 90° clockwise using Aspose.Pdf, and save the modified document.

change-odd-pages-landscape-to-portrait.title: Change Odd‑Numbered Landscape Pages to Portrait
change-odd-pages-landscape-to-portrait.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its pages, and for each odd‑numbered page that is in landscape orientation swaps the MediaBox dimensions to convert it to portrait before saving the result.

move-page-9-to-first-position.title: Move Page 9 to First Position in PDF
move-page-9-to-first-position.description: Shows how to reposition page 9 to the beginning of a PDF by inserting it at index 1 and removing the original page using Aspose.Pdf.

reorder-pdf-pages-custom-sequence.title: Reorder PDF Pages Using a Custom Sequence
reorder-pdf-pages-custom-sequence.description: Demonstrates how to reorder pages of a PDF by copying them into a new document according to a user-defined integer array.

delete-last-three-pages.title: Delete Last Three Pages from PDF
delete-last-three-pages.description: Demonstrates how to remove the final three pages of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf by repeatedly deleting the current last page and then saving the result.

delete-page-range-from-pdf.title: Delete Page Range from PDF
delete-page-range-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove pages 5 through 10 from a PDF document in a single operation using Aspose.Pdf's Delete method.

insert-empty-custom-size-page-at-beginni.title: Insert Empty Custom-Size Page at Beginning of PDF
insert-empty-custom-size-page-at-beginni.description: Demonstrates how to insert a blank page with a custom 200 × 300‑point size at the start of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

append-page-to-pdf.title: Append a Page from One PDF to Another
append-page-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load two PDF files, take the first page from a source document, append it to the end of a target document without altering its content, and save the merged result.

duplicate-page-three-insert-after.title: Duplicate Page Three and Insert After Original
duplicate-page-three-insert-after.description: Demonstrates how to duplicate the third page of a PDF document and insert the copy immediately after the original using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-all-pdf-pages-180-degrees.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
rotate-all-pdf-pages-180-degrees.description: Demonstrates how to rotate every page of a PDF by 180° using Aspose.Pdf and save the modified document.

convert-pdf-pages-portrait-to-landscape.title: Convert PDF Pages from Portrait to Landscape
convert-pdf-pages-portrait-to-landscape.description: Loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterates over each page, swaps the MediaBox width and height using SetPageSize to turn portrait pages into landscape, and saves the modified document.

insert-blank-page-after-each-page.title: Insert Blank Page After Each Page to Double PDF
insert-blank-page-after-each-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, insert a blank page after every existing page, and save the document, resulting in double the original page count.

rotate-pdf-pages-by-parity.title: Rotate PDF Pages Based on Page Number Parity
rotate-pdf-pages-by-parity.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and set a 90° clockwise rotation for odd‑numbered pages while leaving even pages unchanged.

export-pdf-page-dimensions-to-csv.title: Export PDF Page Dimensions to CSV
export-pdf-page-dimensions-to-csv.description: The example opens a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, reads each page's width and height, and writes the page number and dimensions to a CSV file for external analysis.

insert-external-pdf-page-at-index.title: Insert External PDF Page at Specific Position
insert-external-pdf-page-at-index.description: Shows how to insert a page from a source PDF into a target PDF at index two, preserving the page's original size and rotation.

resize-first-pdf-page-custom-dimensions.title: Resize First PDF Page to Custom Dimensions
resize-first-pdf-page-custom-dimensions.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set the first page size to 500 × 700 points, and save the modified document.

rotate-pdf-pages-reverse-order.title: Rotate PDF Pages in Reverse Order
rotate-pdf-pages-reverse-order.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate each page 90 degrees clockwise starting from the last page, and save the modified document.

move-pages-3-6-to-end.title: Move Pages 3‑6 to End of PDF
move-pages-3-6-to-end.description: Shows how to relocate pages 3 through 6 to the end of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf in a single operation.

copy-mediabox-page-8-to-12.title: Copy MediaBox from One PDF Page to Another
copy-mediabox-page-8-to-12.description: Shows how to retrieve the MediaBox rectangle from page 8 of a PDF and assign it to page 12 using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-ten-empty-pages-at-pdf-midpoint.title: Insert Ten Empty Pages at PDF Midpoint
insert-ten-empty-pages-at-pdf-midpoint.description: Demonstrates how to calculate the middle of a PDF document and batch‑insert ten blank pages using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-wide-pdf-pages-to-a4.title: Resize Wide PDF Pages to A4
resize-wide-pdf-pages-to-a4.description: Loads a PDF, checks each page's width, and resizes only pages wider than 600 points to A4 size while leaving narrower pages unchanged.

delete-pdf-pages-from-config.title: Delete PDF Pages Using Config File
delete-pdf-pages-from-config.description: Shows how to read a list of page numbers from an external text file and delete those pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

reorder-pdf-pages-descending.title: Reorder PDF Pages in Descending Order
reorder-pdf-pages-descending.description: Shows how to load a PDF, copy its pages into a new document in reverse (descending) order, and save the reordered file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-pages-to-portrait.title: Convert All PDF Pages to Portrait Orientation
convert-pdf-pages-to-portrait.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, and swaps width and height for landscape pages using MediaBox so that all pages become portrait before saving the document.

rotate-every-third-pdf-page-90-degrees.title: Rotate Every Third PDF Page by 90 Degrees
rotate-every-third-pdf-page-90-degrees.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotating pages whose numbers are divisible by three by 90°, and saving the modified document.

delete-first-page-from-pdf.title: Delete First Page from PDF
delete-first-page-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, remove the first page using the Pages collection, and save the updated document.

resize-pdf-pages-uniform-size.title: Resize PDF Pages to Uniform Size
resize-pdf-pages-uniform-size.description: Loads a PDF, determines the largest page dimensions, and resizes all pages to match those dimensions for a uniform layout.

rotate-restore-pdf-page-orientation.title: Rotate and Restore PDF Page Orientation
rotate-restore-pdf-page-orientation.description: Shows how to rotate a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf, save the rotated file, then revert the page to its original orientation and save the restored document.

extract-resize-reinsert-pdf-pages.title: Extract, Resize to A4, and Reinsert PDF Pages
extract-resize-reinsert-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to extract a range of pages from a PDF, change each page's size to A4, and insert the pages back at a new position using Aspose.Pdf.

move-even-pages-to-end.title: Move Even Pages to End of PDF
move-even-pages-to-end.description: Shows how to reorder a PDF by extracting all even‑numbered pages and appending them to the end while preserving their original order.

resize-pdf-pages-to-template-size.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match Template Size
resize-pdf-pages-to-template-size.description: Demonstrates how to read a template PDF to obtain page dimensions and then resize every page of another PDF to those dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-pdf-pages-by-configurable-angles.title: Rotate PDF Pages by Configurable Angles
rotate-pdf-pages-by-configurable-angles.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotating individual pages based on a dictionary of page numbers to angles, and saving the modified document.

insert-transparent-separator-page.title: Insert Transparent Separator Page into PDF
insert-transparent-separator-page.description: Shows how to add an empty PDF page with a transparent background as a separator between sections using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-last-page-from-pdfs.title: Delete Last Page from PDFs in a Folder
delete-last-page-from-pdfs.description: Loads each PDF file in a given directory, removes its last page, and saves the modified document back to the same location using Aspose.Pdf.

move-pdf-page-between-documents.title: Move PDF Page Between Documents
move-pdf-page-between-documents.description: Demonstrates how to transfer a single page from one PDF file to another while preserving its rotation, size, and other page properties, then saves the updated source and target documents.

crop-pdf-page-using-mediabox.title: Crop PDF Page Using MediaBox
crop-pdf-page-using-mediabox.description: Shows how to set a page's MediaBox (and optionally CropBox) to define a custom cropping region without altering the page content, then save the modified PDF.

batch-resize-pdf-pages-fixed-width.title: Batch Resize PDF Pages to Fixed Width
batch-resize-pdf-pages-fixed-width.description: Shows how to loop through all pages of a PDF and resize each page to a target width of 800 points while preserving the original aspect ratio.

delete-specific-pages-from-pdf.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
delete-specific-pages-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates reading page numbers from a text file and deleting those pages from a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf.

reorder-pdf-pages-landscape-portrait.title: Reorder PDF Pages by Orientation (Landscape then Portrait)
reorder-pdf-pages-landscape-portrait.description: Loads a PDF, separates its pages into landscape and portrait groups, and creates a new PDF with all landscape pages first followed by portrait pages.

add-blank-front-matter-page-with-custom-.title: Add Blank Front‑Matter Page with Custom Label
add-blank-front-matter-page-with-custom-.description: Shows how to insert a blank page at the start of a PDF and assign a custom page label prefix "i" for front‑matter numbering using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-pdf-pages-to-fit-printable-area.title: Resize PDF Pages to Fit Printable Area
resize-pdf-pages-to-fit-printable-area.description: Demonstrates how to resize each page of a PDF to a target size (595 × 842 points) using Aspose.Pdf, scaling the content proportionally.

insert-empty-page-custom-size.title: Insert Empty Page with Custom Size
insert-empty-page-custom-size.description: Shows how to add a blank page to an existing PDF and set its width and height based on user input at runtime.

resize-pdf-pages-to-template-size__v2.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match Template Size
resize-pdf-pages-to-template-size__v2.description: Shows how to resize every page of a PDF to the dimensions of a reference template PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-header-text-to-first-pdf-page.title: Add Header Text to First PDF Page
add-header-text-to-first-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a text header to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's HeaderFooter and MarginInfo configuration.

add-html-header-to-first-three-pdf-pages.title: Add HTML Header with CSS to First Three PDF Pages
add-html-header-to-first-three-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to insert an HTML‑styled header into the first three pages of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-scaled-image-footer-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Scaled Image Footer to Each PDF Page
add-scaled-image-footer-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over all pages, and insert a proportionally scaled footer image at the bottom of each page before saving the document.

add-image-footer-30-opacity-pdf.title: Add Image Footer with 30% Opacity to All PDF Pages
add-image-footer-30-opacity-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent image footer to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-generation-date-footer-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Generation Date Footer to PDF Pages
add-generation-date-footer-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to insert a text footer with the current date on every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-diagonal-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Diagonal Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-diagonal-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent diagonal text watermark to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rotated-image-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Rotated Image Watermark to PDF Pages
add-rotated-image-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add a PNG watermark image to each page of a PDF, scaling it to half the page size and rotating it 45 degrees using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-watermark-20-opacity-pdf-pages.title: Add Image Watermark with 20% Opacity to PDF Pages
add-image-watermark-20-opacity-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to apply an image watermark with 20% opacity to every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-repeating-image-watermark-to-pdf-pag.title: Add Repeating Image Watermark to PDF Pages
add-repeating-image-watermark-to-pdf-pag.description: Demonstrates how to tile a semi‑transparent image stamp across every page of a PDF, creating a grid‑style watermark using Aspose.Pdf.

add-year-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Year Watermark to PDF Pages
add-year-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent text watermark that includes the current year to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent text watermark to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's WatermarkArtifact.

add-semi-transparent-text-watermark.title: Add Semi-Transparent Text Watermark with Outline to PDF Pages
add-semi-transparent-text-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent text watermark with a colored outline to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-lightgray-background-to-pdf-pages.title: Add LightGray Background to All PDF Pages
add-lightgray-background-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, applying a LightGray background color to each page, and saving the branded document.

set-transparent-background-for-pdf-pages.title: Set Transparent Background for PDF Pages
set-transparent-background-for-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to apply a transparent background to an entire PDF document and each of its pages using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-page-background-color.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using RGB
set-pdf-page-background-color.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, applying an RGB brand color as the background for each page, and saving the modified document.

set-pdf-page-background-cmyk.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using CMYK Values
set-pdf-page-background-cmyk.description: Demonstrates how to apply a CMYK background color to all pages of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-page-background-hsl.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using HSL Values
set-pdf-page-background-hsl.description: Demonstrates converting HSL color values to RGB and applying the resulting color as a page background in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-page-background-by-theme.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Based on Theme
set-pdf-page-background-by-theme.description: Shows how to read a theme from a configuration file and apply the corresponding background color to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

alternating-page-background-colors.title: Set Alternating Page Background Colors in PDF
alternating-page-background-colors.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, assign LightGray to odd pages and White to even pages via the Background property, and save the modified document.

add-centered-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Centered Page Numbers to PDF
add-centered-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a centered page number stamp on every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-roman-page-numbers.title: Insert Roman Numeral Page Numbers into PDF
insert-roman-page-numbers.description: Shows how to add uppercase Roman‑numeral page numbers to the introductory pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-chapter-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Chapter Page Numbers to PDF
add-chapter-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate through each page of a PDF and add a footer with a custom "Chapter" prefix and the page number using Aspose.Pdf.

add-leading-zero-page-numbers.title: Add Leading Zero Page Numbers to PDF
add-leading-zero-page-numbers.description: Shows how to insert page numbers on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, formatting single‑digit numbers with a leading zero (01, 02, …).

add-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Page Numbers in "Page X of Y" Format to PDF
add-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert page numbers with a custom "Page X of Y" format on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-page-numbers-current-total.title: Insert Page Numbers with Current/Total Format in PDF
insert-page-numbers-current-total.description: Shows how to add page numbers in the "current/total" format to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf stamps.

add-superscript-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Superscript-Style Page Numbers to PDF
add-superscript-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert page numbers at the bottom-center of each PDF page using a PageNumberStamp with a smaller font to simulate superscript formatting.

add-page-numbers-arial-font.title: Add Page Numbers with Arial Font to PDF
add-page-numbers-arial-font.description: Demonstrates how to insert sequential page numbers on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, with a custom Arial 14‑pt font and bottom‑center alignment.

insert-page-numbers-with-custom-embedded.title: Insert Page Numbers with Custom Embedded Font
insert-page-numbers-with-custom-embedded.description: Demonstrates adding page numbers to every PDF page using a TrueType font loaded from an external file and embedding that font in the resulting PDF.

add-page-numbers-to-odd-pdf-pages.title: Add Page Numbers to Odd PDF Pages
add-page-numbers-to-odd-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to insert page numbers only on odd-numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-numbers-to-even-pdf-pages.title: Add Page Numbers to Even PDF Pages
add-page-numbers-to-even-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating over even-numbered pages, and stamping each with a page number at the bottom center.

insert-bates-numbering-into-pdf-pages.title: Insert Bates Numbering Stamp into PDF Pages
insert-bates-numbering-into-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to add Bates numbering that starts at 1000 with a dash suffix to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-bates-numbering-with-custom-prefi.title: Insert Bates Numbering with Custom Prefix and Suffix
insert-bates-numbering-with-custom-prefi.description: Demonstrates how to add Bates numbering with a custom prefix "DOC" and suffix "-2026" to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-alphanumeric-bates-numbering-to-pdf-.title: Add Alphanumeric Bates Numbering to PDF Pages
add-alphanumeric-bates-numbering-to-pdf-.description: Demonstrates how to add Bates numbering with a custom alphanumeric prefix to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-bates-numbering-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Bates Numbering to PDF Pages
add-bates-numbering-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to insert year‑based Bates numbers in the format "2026-####" on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-bates-numbering-increment-5.title: Batch Bates Numbering with Increment of 5
batch-bates-numbering-increment-5.description: Shows how to add sequential Bates numbers to every page of PDFs in a folder, increasing the number by 5 per page and saving the modified files to an output directory.

remove-existing-bates-numbering-add-new-.title: Remove Existing Bates Numbering and Add New Sequence to PDF
remove-existing-bates-numbering-add-new-.description: Shows how to delete any existing Bates numbering artifacts from all pages of a PDF and then apply a new Bates numbering sequence using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-bates-numbering-from-pdf-pages.title: Remove Bates Numbering from PDF Pages
remove-bates-numbering-from-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to delete all Bates numbering stamps from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and save the cleaned file.

remove-headers-footers-add-new-to-pdf.title: Remove Existing Headers/Footers and Add New Ones to PDF Pages
remove-headers-footers-add-new-to-pdf.description: Shows how to clear any existing header and footer on each page of a PDF and then assign new header and footer text using Aspose.Pdf.

read-pdf-page-count.title: Read PDF Page Count with Aspose.Pdf
read-pdf-page-count.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and retrieve the total number of pages without modifying or saving the document.

read-pdf-page-dimensions__v2.title: Read PDF Page Dimensions
read-pdf-page-dimensions__v2.description: Loads a PDF file and iterates through each page to output its width and height in points using Aspose.Pdf.

adjust-pdf-bleedbox-for-printer-specs.title: Adjust PDF BleedBox for Printer Specifications
adjust-pdf-bleedbox-for-printer-specs.description: Loads a PDF, reads each page's BleedBox (or falls back to MediaBox), expands the box by a fixed offset, and saves the modified document.

retrieve-trimbox-after-cropping.title: Retrieve TrimBox After Cropping a PDF Page
retrieve-trimbox-after-cropping.description: Demonstrates setting a CropBox on a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf, reading the resulting TrimBox coordinates, and saving the cropped document.

crop-pdf-pages-remove-margins.title: Crop PDF Pages to Remove Margins
crop-pdf-pages-remove-margins.description: Shows how to set the CropBox on every page of a PDF with Aspose.Pdf to trim a uniform margin from all sides.

add-bleedbox-extend-cropbox.title: Add BleedBox Extending 5 Points Beyond CropBox
add-bleedbox-extend-cropbox.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, creates a BleedBox that extends 5 points beyond the existing CropBox (or MediaBox), assigns it to the page, and saves the modified document.

trim-white-space-around-pdf-pages.title: Trim White Space Around PDF Pages Using Content Bounding Box
trim-white-space-around-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to remove surrounding white space from each PDF page by calculating the content bounding box and setting the TrimBox, with a fallback for completely blank pages.

trim-blank-pages-with-tolerance.title: Trim Blank Pages from PDF with Tolerance
trim-blank-pages-with-tolerance.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, detecting blank pages using a pixel‑fill tolerance, removing those pages, and saving the trimmed document.

crop-pdf-pages-to-4-3-aspect-ratio.title: Crop PDF Pages to 4:3 Aspect Ratio
crop-pdf-pages-to-4-3-aspect-ratio.description: Shows how to iterate through all pages of a PDF and adjust each page's CropBox so the content fits a fixed 4:3 aspect ratio using Aspose.Pdf.

add-left-aligned-header-logo-to-pdf-page.title: Add Left-Aligned Header Logo to PDF Pages
add-left-aligned-header-logo-to-pdf-page.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates an ImageStamp from a logo image, adds it as a left‑aligned header on every page, and saves the modified document.

add-bold-uppercase-header-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Bold Uppercase Header to Each PDF Page
add-bold-uppercase-header-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add a centered bold uppercase header to every page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.
